tools.name: workflow_list
tools.description: List all available workflows with their status (draft, compiled, needs-compile)

tools.name: workflow_run
tools.description: Execute a compiled workflow by name with the given inputs via the REST API. Returns the final status, run ID, and step outputs.

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the workflow to run

params.name: inputs
params.description: Input values for the workflow (key-value pairs)

params.name: cwd
params.description: Working directory for the workflow run

tools.name: workflow_status
tools.description: Get the current status of a running workflow, including which step is active and outputs so far

params.name: run_id
params.description: The run ID returned by workflow_run

tools.name: workflow_cancel
chat
tools.description: Run a prompt through Claude Code via the dashboard and return the full response. Supports multi-turn via session_id.

params.name: session_id
params.description: Resume a previous session for multi-turn
